content:
Goal
* Please format "R" and "C" as [[variables]].

* Please exclude "+1" and "-1" from variable formatting.

Constraints
* Please change 500 to 10 in the first and second constraints.

* Please change −1 000 to -10.

* Please change 1 000 to 10.

Stub generator
* Line 2: Please use `loopline` instead of `read`. See the syntax here: https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/stub-generator

* Please add a write statement, e.g. write answer.

Cases
* Please add Test 5 and Validator 5: Set R = C = 5, and the grid contains completely random integers between -10 and -1 (i.e. all negative numbers). All possible column transitions (c - 1, c, c + 1) are needed to achieve the expected output.

* Please add Test 6 and Validator 6: Set R = C = 10, and the grid contains completely random integers between -10 and 10. All possible column transitions (c - 1, c, c + 1) are needed to achieve the expected output.

Thanks.
